name: governance_lifecycle
description: Shared governance lifecycle for Articles, Roles, and Decisions. A record is drafted, proposed to the group, and ratified once agreed. Ratified records either close (obligation discharged) or are superseded by a successor. closed and superseded are final.

states.label: Draft
states.description: Being written; not yet put to the group.

states.label: Proposed
states.description: Put to the group for agreement.

states.label: Ratified
states.description: Agreed by the group and in force.

states.label: Closed
states.description: Obligation discharged or matter concluded; no successor.

transitions.name: propose
transitions.description: Put a draft to the group.

transitions.name: revise
transitions.description: Withdraw a proposal for further drafting.

transitions.name: ratify
transitions.description: Group agrees; the record comes into force.

transitions.name: close
transitions.description: Conclude the matter with no successor.
